problem_statement: PR #41971: logging: printk: Fix LOG_PRINTK option and added test for it. Fixes issue: regression: Build fails after switching logging to V2. Removed logging dependency from printk.h and did cleanup in printk.c regarding logging (and userspace). Extended `log_api` testsuite to check `CONFIG_LOG_PRINTK=y` option. ~~PR is based on #41969.~~ Fixes #41915. Signed-off-by: Krzysztof Chruscinski <krzysztof.chruscinski@nordicsemi.no>
